title: Yesh's Pack
description: A clean, adventure-focused modpack with better combat, exploration, and performance. Challenging mobs and smooth multiplayer keep it engaging. Built for fun without the fluff.
body:
### About:
Features:
Performance Boost: Built on a highly optimized foundation using Sodium and Indium to ensure high framerates and a smooth, stutter-free experience even as your world and builds grow.

Breathtaking Visuals: Experience Minecraft like never before with Distant Horizons for massive render distances, paired with Iris Shaders. Includes Continuity, Enhanced Visuals, and Entity Texture/Model Features (ETF/EMF) for polished, immersive details and animations.

Ultimate Building Tools: Say goodbye to tedious block placement. With the inclusion of Axiom and Effortless Building, you have unparalleled control over your world. Whether you're terraforming massive landscapes or constructing intricate bases, these tools make building faster, easier, and more intuitive than ever.

Quality of Life Improvements: Take the tediousness out of survival. Navigate easily with Xaero's Minimap and World Map. Master your crafting and inventory with EMI, Inventory Sorting, Traveler's Backpack, and Stack-to-Nearby-Chests. Plus, enjoy streamlined resource gathering with FallingTrees.

Revamped Combat & Exploration:
Engage in completely overhauled, satisfying melee encounters thanks to Better Combat, now with the added challenge of Eldritch Mobs. Explore a completely transformed and dangerous underworld with BetterNether, alongside newly generated structures scattered throughout the overworld.
